ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "crim_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "zn" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to the five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "black" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of Black residents by town */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "medv" REAL /* Median value of owner-occupied homes in $1000s */,
  "property_address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, commercial) */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "lot_size" INTEGER /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code of the property */,
  "property_owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property related to the crime statistics */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported in the neighborhood */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes reported */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes reported */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were recorded */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the types of crimes */,
  "crime_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square miles */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median value of homes in the neighborhood */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transportation_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the availability and quality of public transportation */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level attained in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of racial demographics */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender demographics */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Average household size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_planning" (
  "planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning initiative */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood affected by the planning */,
  "planned_investment" REAL /* Total planned investment for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or expected outcome of the project */,
  "responsible_agency" TEXT /* Name of the agency responsible for the project */,
  "public_involvement" TEXT /* Level of public involvement in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_planning_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_estate_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real estate agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent works for */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the industry */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the agent */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the agent's office */,
  "client_reviews" TEXT /* Summary of client reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent handling the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property at the time of transaction */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of closing the transaction */,
  "brokerage_fee" REAL /* Brokerage fee charged for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES real_estate_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property associated with the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the specific feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature */,
  "feature_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the feature */,
  "feature_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
